tasks.desc: Create optimized OG image 1200x630 webp + jpg fallback in public/og/; update BaseLayout.astro to reference og image and meta (og:image, og:width/height, twitter:image, twitter:card, canonical); add preload/preconnect for Playfair Display and Inter; ensure <html lang="es">; add link rel=preload for key font files using font-display:swap. Minimal other changes.
